quotes.text: Your brand isn't what you say it is. It's what Google says it is. And what Reddit says. And what that one angry customer says.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your business is only as good as its worst customer experience. One viral complaint can undo a year of good work.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your brand is what people say about you when you're not in the room. Make sure they're saying good things.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your reputation is built on how you handle failure, not how you handle success.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your personal brand is what people say about you when you're not in the room. Make sure it's worth saying.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your reputation precedes you. Build it intentionally.
quotes.author: based
